entries.title: Authority Map Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the role, structure, and boundary rules for the authored authority-map registry stored under `core/control_plane/registries/`.

entries.title: Command Index Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the role, structure, and boundary rules for machine-readable command indexes stored under `core/control_plane/indexes/commands/`.

entries.title: Format Selection Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines how the repository chooses data and document formats for governed artifacts.

entries.title: Foundation Index Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the role, structure, and boundary rules for machine-readable foundation indexes stored under `core/control_plane/indexes/foundations/`.

entries.title: Pack Interface Contract Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the governed machine contracts that connect hosted packs to reusable core and host composition.

entries.title: Reference Index Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the role, structure, and boundary rules for machine-readable reference indexes stored under `core/control_plane/indexes/references/`.

entries.title: Repository Path Index Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the role, structure, and boundary rules for generated repository path indexes stored under `core/control_plane/indexes/`.

entries.title: Route Index Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the role, structure, and boundary rules for machine-readable route indexes stored under `core/control_plane/indexes/routes/`.

entries.title: Schema Catalog Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the role, structure, and boundary rules for the authored schema catalog registry stored under `core/control_plane/registries/`.

entries.title: Schema Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines how governed structured data is modeled with JSON Schema in this repository and how those schemas are organized under `core/control_plane/schemas/`.

entries.title: Standard Index Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the role, structure, and boundary rules for machine-readable standard indexes stored under `core/control_plane/indexes/standards/`.

entries.title: Workflow Index Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the role, structure, and boundary rules for machine-readable workflow indexes stored under `core/control_plane/indexes/workflows/`.

entries.title: AGENTS.md Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the role, scope, structure, and authoring rules for `AGENTS.md` files used at the repository root and within nested directory subtrees.

entries.title: Command Document Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines how repository-native command reference documents are written under shared core or owning-pack command-doc roots so humans can discover available commands, scan usage quickly, and route from a command index to durable command pages.

entries.title: Compact Document Authoring Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the repository rule that authored documents should stay concise without sacrificing the depth, structure, or markdown quality needed for real human review.

entries.title: Documentation Semantics Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the cross-family semantic guardrails enforced for governed Markdown documents and workflow modules.

entries.title: Foundation Document Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the minimum governed shape for foundation documents stored under `core/docs/foundations/`.

entries.title: README.md Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the role, structure, and boundary rules for `README.md` files used as directory-level orientation documents in this repository.

entries.title: Reference Document Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the role, structure, and quality expectations for reference documents, especially external reference documents under `core/docs/references/**`.

entries.title: ROUTING_TABLE.md Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the structure and expected content of `ROUTING_TABLE.md` as the canonical task-to-workflow routing surface for the repository.

entries.title: Standard Document Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the expected document shape for governed standard and best-practice documents stored under shared and pack-owned standards roots.

entries.title: Workflow Markdown Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the document-level structure and boundary rules for workflow Markdown files in this repository.

entries.title: CLI Help Text Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the minimum detail, structure, and example quality for repository CLI help text so new engineers, operators, and agents can discover commands without reading implementation code first.

entries.title: Core Host Pack Python Boundary Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the required split between reusable core, host composition, and pack-native Python code for WatchTower packages.

entries.title: Domain Pack Authoring Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines how a hosted domain pack should be structured so it integrates cleanly with reusable core and host composition.

entries.title: Engineering Best Practices Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines repository-specific engineering best practices for implementation, validation, and synchronized updates across human-readable and machine-readable surfaces.

entries.title: Git Commit Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the repository commit-message policy for human maintainers and assistant contributors. It combines Conventional Commits v1.0.0 with local commit-writing guidance so history remains human-auditable and machine-parseable.

entries.title: Git Workflow Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines repository-standard local git workflow behavior, including branch naming, branch lifecycle, and local sync expectations for human and assistant contributors.

entries.title: Hosted Pack Integration Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the minimum surfaces and extension rules a hosted pack must satisfy to integrate with reusable core and host composition.

entries.title: Python Code Design Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the local design philosophy, naming rules, and consolidation rules for Python code under reusable core, host composition, and approved pack-owned Python boundaries.

entries.title: Python Workspace Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines how Python code, tooling, environments, and tests are organized across reusable core, host composition, and approved pack-owned package roots.

entries.title: Runtime Telemetry Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the baseline local runtime telemetry contract for command timing, error tracing, and pack-local telemetry sinks.

entries.title: Front Matter Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines when repository documents should use front matter, which keys are canonical, and how parsed front matter is validated as structured metadata.

entries.title: Naming and IDs Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines how governed repository artifacts are named and how stable machine-usable identifiers are assigned.

entries.title: Terminology Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines how repository terminology is chosen, stabilized, and used so durable docs and governed artifacts do not drift into competing names for the same concept.

entries.title: Timestamp Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the canonical timestamp field names and UTC timestamp format used by governed documents and machine-readable artifacts in this repository.

entries.title: Repository Maintenance Loop Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the recurring local repository-maintenance loop for keeping docs, workflows, governed artifacts, and derived surfaces aligned as the repo grows.

entries.title: Repository Validation Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the baseline validation expectations for repository changes across governed documents, governed artifacts, and the Python helper workspace.

entries.title: Routing and Context Loading Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines how repository instructions, routing surfaces, and workflow modules are loaded so task execution starts with the minimum correct context.

entries.title: Workflow Design Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines how workflow modules in this repository should be designed, structured, and bounded.

entries.title: Acceptance Contract Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines machine-readable acceptance contracts stored under `core/control_plane/contracts/acceptance/`.

entries.title: Coordination Index Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the role, structure, and boundary rules for the machine-readable coordination index stored at `plan/.wt/indexes/coordination_index.json`.

entries.title: Initiative Index Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the role, structure, and boundary rules for the machine-readable initiative index stored at `plan/.wt/indexes/initiative_index.json`.

entries.title: Planning Index Family Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the shared baseline for live plan-related derived index standards stored under `core/control_plane/indexes/` and `plan/.wt/indexes/`.

entries.title: Status Tracking Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the lifecycle status vocabulary for governed repository artifacts.

entries.title: Task Index Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the role, structure, and boundary rules for the live plan task summary index stored at `plan/.wt/indexes/task_index.json`.

entries.title: Traceability Index Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the unified machine-readable traceability index stored under `core/control_plane/indexes/traceability/`.

entries.title: Validation Evidence Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines committed validation-evidence records stored under `core/control_plane/records/validation_evidence/`.

entries.title: Acceptance and Evidence Reconciliation Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines how initiative acceptance IDs, acceptance contracts, validation evidence, validator references, and traceability should reconcile for one traced initiative.

entries.title: Coordination Tracking Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the repository's compact traced-planning coordination tracker so humans can browse retained planning corpus context without replacing the live `plan/**` authority surfaces.

entries.title: Decision Capture Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines how durable repository decisions should be recorded so rationale, tradeoffs, status, and downstream impacts remain clear over time.

entries.title: GitHub Collaboration Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines how GitHub issue forms, pull requests, labels, and project fields complement the repo-local planning and task model.

entries.title: GitHub Task Sync Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the repository's GitHub task sync contract for mirroring initiative-local live task records to GitHub without making GitHub the source of truth.

entries.title: Initiative Closeout Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines how traced initiatives move to a terminal closeout state without overloading artifact lifecycle status.

entries.title: Initiative Tracking Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the repository's live initiative tracking model over plan/.wt indexes with richer human companion trackers.

entries.title: Guidance Promotion Standard
entries.summary: Durable operational standard for governed guidance promotion. Defines the required machine contracts and durable-document expectations that allow source initiative packages to be purged cleanly.

entries.title: Planning Retention and Purge Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the promote-then-purge retention model for closed traced planning artifacts so active policy lives in current canonical surfaces instead of accumulating indefinitely in historical trace packages.

entries.title: Reference Distillation Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines how externally published source material is distilled into durable local reference guidance and, when needed, translated into explicit repository policy.

entries.title: Rewrite Execution Control Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the parity contract, slice-control package, checkpoint workflow, and phase-entry guardrails for the structural rewrite program.

entries.title: Rewrite Surface Classification Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the four-axis classification and retention-reason model that the structural rewrite program must use before any surface is moved, retired, or reclassified.

entries.title: Task Handling Threshold Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines when repository work must create, update, transition, or explicitly decline a durable local task record.

entries.title: Task Tracking Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the hard-cutover live task tracking model built on initiative-local plan task state and derived plan-workspace indexes.

entries.title: Traceability Standard
entries.summary: This standard defines the repository's baseline traceability model so initiative intent, decisions, designs, implementation slices, and later executable or validation surfaces can be linked end to end.
